description: Drafts Google review replies; human approves before posting. Free no-token response-rate check.

headers.description: Optional for the public discovery tools (get_service_info, search_business, check_response_rate). Business-scoped tools require a per-business bearer token (format: sragt_...). Send as: Authorization: Bearer sragt_...
headers.name: Authorization
